meaning: 夏洛特敦[加拿大东南部港市](爱德华太子岛省省会)
examples: BTW, its capital, Charlottetown is the birthplace of Canada.
Fortunately we haven't seen any of them show up in the Charlottetown riding.
Residents of the capital Charlottetown celebrated the lifting of the ban at a street party.
Bank of Canada Governor Mark Carney zeroed in on this point in a speech last week in Charlottetown, Prince Edward Island.
The first stop for Will and Kate will be Charlottetown.
